title: Job Opening Teacher at IDP Education India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at IDP Education India
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Teacher in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!
